title: Iran Has Been Consistent in War. Will It Be Consistent in Peace Talks?
summary_full: While President Trump’s war aims have changed by the moment, Iran has stuck to firm demands. The question is whether it will compromise in peace negotiations.
summary_public: While President Trump’s war aims have changed by the moment, Iran has stuck to firm demands. The question is whether it will compromise in peace negotiations.
